text:
Created attachment 189829
htop core dum, tar compressed

I spoke too soon. An instance of htop, started about 20 hours ago, just crashed with same error message:

htop 2.0.2 aborting.

Unfortunately, you seem to be using an unsupported platform!
Please contact your platform package maintainer!

[1]    47852 abort (core dumped)  htop
